key.description: The taint key to be applied to a node.

value.description: The taint value corresponding to the taint key.

effect.description: Effect defines the effects of Taint.

values.NoSchedule: Do not allow new pods to schedule onto the node unless they tolerate the taint
values.PreferNoSchedule: Like TaintEffectNoSchedule, but the scheduler tries not to schedule new pods onto the node, rather than prohibiting new pods from scheduling onto the node entirely
values.NoExecute: Evict any already-running pods that do not tolerate the taint (Currently enforced by NodeController)
